objective: Find the K2.7 subagent crash threshold by testing progressively longer computations
description: Spawn multiple K2.7 subagents with increasing timeouts (15s, 30s, 45s, 60s, 90s, 120s) doing simple busy-work. Record which ones complete and which fail with 'session completed before registry settled'.

spawn_configs.task: Count from 1 to 1000, return the last number
Count from 1 to 10000, return the last number
Count from 1 to 50000, return the last number
Count from 1 to 100000, return the last number
Count from 1 to 200000, return the last number
Count from 1 to 300000, return the last number

detect.crash_threshold: Identify the timeout/duration where subagents start failing
detect.timeout_pattern: Check if failures correlate with timeout or duration
